summary: Completed testing of Service Desk full-screen module, Collections product_count fix, and Dine page restaurants/products. All requested features verified working correctly.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Service Desk is now a full-screen dedicated module at /admin/service-desk with its own login. Collections API correctly calculates product_count from product_ids. Dine page shows 38 restaurants, 5 bundles, and 18 products.

verification_summary.service_desk_back_button: VERIFIED - 'Back to Admin Dashboard' button at top left with data-testid='back-to-admin-btn'
verification_summary.service_desk_no_navbar: VERIFIED - No navbar/footer, completely full-screen experience
verification_summary.collections_product_count_not_zero: VERIFIED - Collections return correct product_count calculated from product_ids array
verification_summary.dine_restaurants_showing: VERIFIED - 38 restaurants displayed with images, ratings, pet menu badges
verification_summary.dine_products_showing: VERIFIED - 18 dine products and 5 bundles displayed

api_tests_results.collections_endpoint: PASS - Returns 22 collections with correct product_count
api_tests_results.dine_restaurants: PASS - Returns 38 restaurants with required fields
